issue.observed: 入力オーディオバッファはモノラルではありません！チャンネル数は2です。1であるべきです。
issue.rootCause: A microphone or browser may ignore the requested channelCount of 1, and the decoded stereo AudioBuffer was passed to Basic Pitch without normalization.

fix.algorithm: Average every decoded channel for each frame and clamp the result to [-1, 1].
defenseInDepth: audioBlobToWav always emits mono for microphone, imported humming, voice memo, and AI source/reference audio.
BasicPitchTranscriber creates a one-channel AudioBuffer immediately before evaluateModel.

fullChromiumE2e.includes: stereo humming file to bundled Basic Pitch notes

remainingGate: The user must retry the physical microphone path; this is the user brush-up gate and does not reduce the local automated proof.
